---
title: "Fuzzy Matching Benchmark"
format: gfm
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
helper <- if (file.exists("analysis/_analysis_helpers.R")) "analysis/_analysis_helpers.R" else "../_analysis_helpers.R"
source(helper)
```

## Legacy comments

```{r legacy-comments, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_render_legacy_comments("16-match-districts-test-joining-methods.R", caption = "Legacy Chunk 16: string-distance tuning notes")
```

```{r deviation-note, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_deviation_note("The legacy prose is rendered from the old comments. The tables below replace the old hand-counted diagnostics with current target outputs and keep the original final thresholds visible.")
```

## Current targets-backed results

```{r coverage, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("benchmarking", "fuzzy_matching", "fuzzy_matching_candidate_pair_coverage.csv"), "Benchmark candidate-pair coverage")
```

```{r tuning-reference, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("benchmarking", "fuzzy_matching", "fuzzy_matching_legacy_tuning_reference.csv"), "Legacy fuzzy-tuning reference results")
```

```{r threshold, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("benchmarking", "fuzzy_matching", "fuzzy_matching_threshold_sensitivity.csv"), "Threshold sensitivity by method and pair source")
```
